productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Stripes White Polo  Tshirt
description: Composition White polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with appliqued logo on the right sleeve, buttoned placket, horizontal panel stitched stripe in a contrasting color, appliqued branding on the left chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Ramp up your style quotient with this stylish T-shirt from US Polo. The vertical panel stitch on the front pays tribute to classic sport fashion. Pair it with fitting denims, a tonal jacket and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
